---
title: "ewing Demos Gallery"
subtitle: "Interactive spline parameter and goal calculators running in your browser"
engine: knitr
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - fivePlotApp.qmd
    - fiveShowApp.qmd
  type: grid
  categories: false
---

This gallery showcases interactive spline tools from the **ewing** R package, running completely client-side in your browser using serverless WebAssembly.
